rationale: Frontend rewrite around a dedicated Canvas 2D renderer, matching the body's claims. New files: frontend/src/renderer/ houses BoardRenderer (canvas drawing for covered/revealed cells, grid lines, chunk borders, vector mines/flags), frontend/src/hooks/useChunkStore.ts handles socket chunk subscribe/unsubscribe + delta merging extracted from the old ChunkLoader, frontend/src/chunkWire.ts encapsulates the wire-format → Chunk conversion shared by the store, and frontend/src/components/{GameView,GameCanvas,GameHud}.tsx provide the thin React shell with HUD overlay, input handling, and rAF paint loop. Deletions match: legacy Board.tsx, Cell.tsx, BoardSVG.tsx, ChunkLoader.tsx, CanvasBoard.tsx, ChunkedBoard.css, SingleChunkPage.tsx/.css are all removed; .bak files (gameClient.js.bak, main.js.bak) are cleaned up. App.tsx is updated to mount the new GameView. CLAUDE.md may be updated to reflect the new architecture. CHUNK_SIZE and the socket protocol are preserved per the body's compatibility statement. This is a wholesale architectural refactor with both additions and matching deletions, not a hidden cheat.
